ResourceName.markdownDescription:
---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Minimum Length: 1  
Maximum Length: 64  
Pattern: (?!^[0-9]+$)([a-zA-Z0-9-_' ']+)  
Update requires: No interruption

HostedZoneAssociationStatus.markdownDescription:
---

Required: No  
Type: String

Update requires: No interruption

ResourceArn.markdownDescription:
---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Minimum Length: 1  
Maximum Length: 2048  
Pattern: arn:[-.a-z0-9]{1,63}:[-.a-z0-9]{1,63}:[-.a-z0-9]{0,63}:[-.a-z0-9]{0,63}:[^/].{0,1023}  
Update requires: No interruption
